creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Wine has a dozen or two further options that we do not have as 
OPTION in this port.  Without a concrete use case (application,...) 
and a successful test, I am very hesitant to add complexity to an 
already complex/hard to test port. 

Can you share what triggered this patch?  Why it is important?
